name: Sherman Ferguson
abstract: Sherman Eugene Ferguson (October 31, 1944 – January 22, 2006) was an American jazz drummer. For a time he was a member of the jazz trio Heard Ranier Ferguson.

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Burrell
about_quotes.evidence: the last time we saw you perform live was at the IAJE when you had Sherman Ferguson... watching you with Sherman was a real treat
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Burrell — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Gerald Wiggins
about_quotes.evidence: But on occasion I use Sherman Ferguson and other guys, you know.
about_quotes.doc_title: Gerald Wiggins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, September 2, 1995
